generatedFrom: Visuelle source data with transaction-derived lifecycle actuals through W52 where available

googleTrendSignal.note: Google Trends adjustment compares weighted category/color/fabric search interest in the forecast window against the previous 12 lifecycle weeks; capped between 0.85x and 1.15x.

storeSignalBasis.formula: allocationWeight = 70% actual-to-date store share + 30% recent-4-week store share, capped at 2.5x actual-to-date share and normalized across stores
